FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Namespace FluentGpu.Pal.Windows

Classes

Win32App

Real Win32 PAL: CreateWindowExW + a static WndProc + a PeekMessage pump that drains WM_* into POD input.

Win32Clipboard

Win32 clipboard (CF_UNICODETEXT). UI-thread only; opens are retried briefly (another app may hold it).

Win32PopupWindow

A borderless, non-activating, owned top-level popup HWND — the Win32 backing of IPlatformPopupWindow and the engine analogue of WinUI's windowed CPopup (microsoft-ui-xaml Popup_Partial.cpp:1019 SetIsWindowed() creates an HWND via PopupSiteBridge so flyouts/menus can render OUTSIDE the XAML window; Popup_Partial.cpp:951-970 IsConstrainedToRootBounds == false for windowed popups).

  • WS_POPUP + owner: borderless, z-ordered above the owner, hidden when the owner minimizes.
  • WS_EX_NOACTIVATE + MA_NOACTIVATE: the popup NEVER takes activation — keyboard focus stays on the owner window exactly like WinUI's popup site (the dispatcher keeps routing keys to the main window).
  • WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW: no taskbar button / Alt-Tab entry.
  • WS_EX_NOREDIRECTIONBITMAP: no GDI redirection surface — the host presents into it with its own composition swapchain (same composited-surface model as the main window).
  • Mouse input over the popup is FORWARDED to the owner Win32Window, translated popup-client → screen → owner-client → owner DIP, so the one InputDispatcher hit-tests the popup subtree at its scene coordinates (the subtree stays in the single SceneStore; out-of-bounds coords hit-test fine).
Win32TextInput

Imm32 IME plumbing for one window: suppresses the system composition window, reads the composition string + caret + clause attributes on WM_IME_COMPOSITION, forwards them to the registered sink, and positions the candidate window at the caret (CFS_EXCLUDE). Reused buffers — the typing edge allocates only event strings.

Win32Theme

Windows system-theme integration: the real accent color + DWM dark titlebar / Mica backdrop.

Win32Window
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
